metadesc_interactive_playground_fo.en: Interactive playground for the CSS shape() function — build complex clip-path and offset-path shapes visually with drag-and-drop controls, presets, and code export. Interop 2026.

subtitle_pit_two_selectors_against.en: Pit two selectors against each other and see which one wins

metadesc_calculate_and_visualize_c.en: Calculate and visualize CSS selector specificity. Paste any selector to see its specificity score broken down by IDs, classes, and elements.

placeholder_enter_one_selector_per_li.en:
Enter one selector per line, e.g.:
#nav .item
div.container > p
.active:hover
h1.title::before

metadesc_interactive_css_stacking.en: Interactive CSS stacking context visualizer. Understand z-index, stacking contexts, and paint order. Build layouts and see which elements stack on top.

h3_paint_order_within_a_stac.en: Paint Order Within a Stacking Context

strong_z_index_only_works_on_pos.en: z-index only works on positioned elements

strong_z_index_is_relative_to_th.en: z-index is relative to the parent stacking context

strong_fixed_positioning_inside.en: Fixed positioning inside a transformed parent

metadesc_interactive_starting_styl.en: Interactive @starting-style playground. Animate elements from display:none. Modals, popovers, toasts with pure CSS entry animations.

metadesc_interactive_css_subgrid_p.en: Interactive CSS subgrid playground. Align nested grids to parent tracks. Visual builder with presets.

h2_align_nested_grids_to_par.en: Align nested grids to parent tracks

metadesc_visual_css_text_shadow_ge.en: Visual CSS text-shadow generator. Multiple layers, 12 presets, live preview. Copy CSS code.

metadesc_interactive_playground_fo.en: Interactive playground for CSS transition-behavior: allow-discrete. Explore display, visibility, and overlay transitions with live demos, timeline visualization, and copyable code.

subtitle_animate_display_visibilit.en: Animate display, visibility, and other discrete CSS properties

metadesc_build_css_transitions_vis.en: Build CSS transitions visually with live preview. Configure property, duration, timing function, and delay, then copy the generated code.

metadesc_interactive_playground_fo.en: Interactive playground for CSS sin(), cos(), tan(), atan2() math functions. Build circular layouts, orbits, waves, and more with native CSS trigonometry.
Interactive playground for the CSS Typed Object Model API. Explore typed CSS values, unit arithmetic, transform building, and performance comparisons — all in the browser.

jtc_simulated_css_typed_om_n.en: [Simulated] CSS Typed OM not available.\nIn a supported browser, this would return a typed value.

jtc_null_property_not_in_comp.en: null (property not in computed style map)

metadesc_convert_between_css_units.en: Convert between CSS units: px, rem, em, vw, vh, %, pt, cm. Live calculator with unit reference. Free.

subtitle_convert_between_css_units.en: Convert between CSS units. Live calculator & reference.

metadesc_explore_and_manage_css_cu.en: Explore and manage CSS custom properties. Define variables, see inheritance in real time, and generate reusable design token stylesheets.

title_css_zoom_property_playgro.en: CSS zoom Property Playground — Dev Vault

metadesc_interactive_css_zoom_prop.en: Interactive CSS zoom property playground. Compare zoom vs transform:scale(), explore layout reflow, nested zoom, responsive scaling, and generate code. Interop 2025.

footer_css_zoom_property_playgro.en: CSS zoom Property Playground — Dev Vault

metadesc_convert_csv_to_json_and_j.en: Convert CSV to JSON and JSON to CSV. Auto-detect headers, custom delimiters, preview table. Free, no upload.

subtitle_convert_between_csv_and_j.en: Convert between CSV and JSON. No upload, no server.

title_curl_command_builder_visu.en: cURL Command Builder — Visual HTTP Request Generator

metadesc_build_curl_commands_visua.en: Build curl commands visually. Set method, URL, headers, body, auth, query params. Copy ready-to-run command. No signup.

subtitle_build_curl_commands_visua.en: Build curl commands visually — method, headers, body, auth

title_custom_elements_builder_w.en: Custom Elements Builder — Web Components Visual Editor

metadesc_build_web_components_visu.en: Build Web Components visually. Define custom elements with lifecycle callbacks, observed attributes, properties, and shadow DOM. Live preview, ES6 export, 5+ presets.

title_data_uri_converter_file_t.en: Data URI Converter — File, Text & Decode

metadesc_convert_files_to_data_uri.en: Convert files to data URIs and back. Drag & drop any file, encode text, decode data URIs. No upload — runs 100% in your browser.

placeholder_enter_text_html_css_json.en: Enter text, HTML, CSS, JSON, SVG, JavaScript…

metadesc_convert_between_date_and.en: Convert between date and time formats: Unix timestamp, ISO 8601, RFC 2822, UTC, local time, relative time, and more.

subtitle_convert_between_date_and.en: Convert between date and time formats

metadesc_interactive_playground_fo.en: Interactive playground for Declarative Shadow DOM. Explore template shadowrootmode, SSR hydration, slot projection, style encapsulation, and component patterns.

subtitle_decorators_are_a_proposal.en: Decorators are a proposal for extending JavaScript classes. They allow you to annotate and modify classes and their members at definition time. The Stage 3 proposal (TC39) introduces a standardized decorator syntax that differs significantly from the legacy (experimental) TypeScript/Babel decorators.

subtitle_click_a_pattern_to_see_it.en: Click a pattern to see its implementation and run it interactively.

subtitle_select_a_decorator_type_a.en: Select a decorator type and customize it. The generated code will appear below.

jtc_native_decorators_are_sup.en: Native decorators are supported in this browser. All demos will run natively.

jtc_native_decorators_are_not.en: Native decorators are NOT supported in this browser. Demos use simulated execution to illustrate behavior.

title_dep_changelog_see_what_ch.en: Dep Changelog — See What Changed in Your Dependencies

metadesc_paste_your_package_json_a.en: Paste your package.json and instantly see changelogs for all dependencies. Breaking changes highlighted. No signup, no tracking.

placeholder_dependencies_react_18_2.en:
{"dependencies": {"react": "^18.2.0", "next": "^14.0.0"}}

Or just list package names:
react
next
express

jalert_no_dependencies_found_in.en: No dependencies found in this package.json

metadesc_generate_dependabot_yml_v.en: Generate dependabot.yml visually. npm, pip, cargo, go, docker, github-actions ecosystems. Schedule, groups, ignore rules.
